hero.title: Faiga Inisinia E Fua
hero.subtitle: Enterprise Software · AI ma Masini A'oa'oina · Cloud Infrastructure · IoT ma Edge
hero.description: Mai le atamai otometi i ao-native tulaga, matou te tusiaina ma tu'uina atu le tekonolosi e fa'amalosia ai pisinisi naunauta'i — i le taimi, i le paketi, i le fua.
hero.trustLine: Fa'atuatuaina e kamupani i le lalolagi atoa

services.subtitle: O a matou auaunaga
services.title: Inisinia Atoa-Fusi o Fusi
services.description: Ono vaega fa'ata'ita'i. Tasi le 'au. O vaega uma o lau tekonolosi fa'aputuga - mai pito masini i pisinisi dashboards.

customSoftware.title: Atina'e o Polokalama Fa'apitoa
customSoftware.description: O talosaga fa'aonapo nei na fausia ma microservices, APIs, ma cloud-native architecture.

aiMl.title: AI, ML ma Pisinisi Atamai
aiMl.description: AI / ML paipa, Power BI dashboards, ma alualu i luma analytics e liliu fa'amaumauga i fa'aiuga.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
cloud.description: O le tele o ao atina'e ma koneteina, serverless, ma le lalolagi atoa scalability fausia i totonu.

iot.title: IoT ma Edge Computing
iot.description: Masini feso'ota'i, masaga numera, ma pito computing mo Alamanuia 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps ma Platform Engineering
devops.description: CI / CD paipa, atina'e e pei o le code, ma le mata'ituina mai le tautinoga i le gaosiga.

digital.title: Suiga Faafuainumera ma Faufautua
digital.description: Tekonolosi fuafuaga, fa'aonaponei auala fa'afanua, ma lima-i luga o faufautua.

cta.title: Sei o tatou fausia se mea matuia
cta.description: Mai le atina'eina o polokalama fa'apitoa ma fofo fa'amalosia AI i ao atina'e ma otometi - matou te tu'uina atu auaunaga fa'atekonolosi fa'apitoa e fetaui ma ou mana'oga.

credibility.subtitle: O la matou fa'amaumauga
credibility.title: Taunuuga, ae le o <gradient>folafolaga</gradient>
credibility.description: Mai Sarajevo i Oslo, Amsterdam, ma Berlin. O fa'amaumauga fa'apitoa e tu'uina atu i le taimi sa'o, i taimi uma.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM mo Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Fausiaina le ulua'i ao-fa'avae One Identity infrastructure mo Atlas Copco i luga o Azure Kubernetes, fa'aititia tau a'o fa'atumauina le tausisia o pisinisi.

orange.label: Orange Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Atia'e Azure Kubernetes atina'e, CI / CD paipa, ma le tu'ufa'atasia o le ServiceNow mo le ta'imua o le cybersecurity i Europa.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Fausia GIS tulaga fa'afanua i lalo o le eleele i Siamani ma le mauaina o fete'ena'iga e puipuia ai le fa'aleagaina o le tele o miliona Euro atina'e.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub fa'atautaia le faitau afe o masini, Synapse fa'agaioia piliona o laina telemetry, fa'atasi ai ma le fa'aputuputuina o fe'au fa'aititia tau e ~ 90%.

drone.label: Tuto'atasi Drone Platform
drone.outcome: Custom flight controller ma 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub bridge e mafai ai ona tuto'atasi BVLOS va'alele mo fa'ato'aga mata'ituina ma payload delivery.

payment.label: Lavea'i o le Faiga o Totogi
payment.outcome: Lavea'i le toilalo o le faitoto'a totogiina mo le Norwegian mobile app e ala i le toe fa'afo'i-inisinia undocumented legacy code. Leai se totogi downtime post-modernization.

game.label: AAA Ta'aloga Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Fausia Maya plugin na tipiina 3D fa'ata'ita'iga ma fa'afiafiaga taimi e 50% i se tele AAA studio, fa'aaogaina o se mea masani i le gaosiga paipa.

social.label: Nofoaga Fa'avae Fa'avae Fa'avae Fa
social.outcome: Fausiaina tafaoga faamasani polokalama mo Sepania nightlife vaaiga ma geolocation fa'atusatusa, moni-taimi fe'au, ma tulei fa'asilasilaga mo se UK tagata fa'atau.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Fausiaina autu backend mo cloud-native identity pulega tulaga tautuaina Fortune 500 tagata fa'atau ma tu ASP.NET Core Identity mo NoSQL i pisinisi fua.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Fa'afeso'ota'i, Fa'asalalauga Fa'avaomalo
euAdjacent.description: CET itula faigaluega ma le poto masani e aofia ai Nouei, Netherlands, Siamani, ma tua atu.

yourEngineers.title: O au inisinia, ae le o se tagata fa'atau
yourEngineers.description: Tagata fa'apitoa o le 'au o lo'o fa'apipi'iina i lau galuega ma mea faigaluega. Leai ni pule o teugatupe, leai ni laina pepa ulufale.

hardwareToCloud.title: Masini i le ao
hardwareToCloud.description: Mai le firmware o masini fa'apipi'i i le Enterprise Azure Synapse pipelines. Polokalama faakomepiuta atoatoa i vaega uma.

partners.subtitle: Faaputuga Tekonolosi
partners.title: <gradient>Fa'aputuga</gradient> Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'ata'ita'iga
partners.description: Matou te le na o le fa'aaogaina o nei mea faigaluega — ua matou lafoina faiga gaosiga ma i latou. Mai Microsoft Azure i Kubernetes, o a matou inisinia o lo'o i ai le poto masani i le lalolagi.

cloudInfra.label: Ao ma Atina'e Tetele
cloudInfra.description: Multi-ao fausaga ma koneteina orchestration ma atina'e e pei o le code.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Fa'avae vaega fa'aonapo nei ma ituaiga saogalemu ma fausiaina meafaigaluega fausiaina.

backend.label: Backend ma API
backend.description: Atina'e-vasega 'au'aunaga fa'avae, faiga gagana, ma fa'aonapo nei API fa'ata'ita'iga.

data.label: Fa'amaumauga ma le teuina
data.description: Fa'afeso'ota'iga, fa'amaumauga, ma faleoloa i totonu o le manatuaina ma le sailiga o tusitusiga atoa.

devops.label: DevOps ma Meafaigaluega
devops.description: CI / CD paipa, lomiga pulea, ma atinae gaosiga.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native e ala i le faaletonu
cloudNative.description: O poloketi uma e containerized, CI / CD-tulia, ma fausia mo fua faalava mai le aso tasi.

fullStack.title: Fa'aputuga atoa
fullStack.description: Mai le React frontends i le .NET microservices i Kubernetes clusters — tasi le 'au, iuga i le iuga.

productionProven.title: Gaosiga-Fa'amaonia
productionProven.description: E le o ni tekinolosi demo. O meafaigaluega ta'itasi o lo'o lisiina e fa'amalosia ai faiga moni o lo'o tautuaina tagata fa'aoga moni i aso nei.

faq.subtitle: Fa'avae o le Malamalama
faq.title: <gradient>Fesili</gradient> e masani ona fesiligia
faq.description: Mea uma e tatau ona e iloa e uiga i le galulue fa'atasi ma Horizon Tech

scope.question: O le a lau lautele o galuega?
scope.answer: Matou te tu'uina atu iuga-i-le-iuga tekonolosi poloketi: fa'apitoa pisinisi polokalama, AI / ML paipa, ao atina'e, IoT faiga, DevOps otometi, ma numera suiga faufautua. Pe e te mana'omia se fa'avae atoa fausia mai le amataga po'o se tu'ufa'atasia fa'apitoa ma lau fa'aputuga o lo'o i ai, matou te fa'atautaia le tusiata fale, atina'e, su'ega, ma le fa'aaogaina.

stack.question: O le a lau fa'aputuga tekonolosi autu?
stack.answer: O la matou fa'aputuga autu e fa'atotonugalemu i luga o atina'e-vasega tulaga: Azure ma AWS mo ao, .NET ma Node.js mo backend, React ma Angular mo frontend, Kubernetes ma Docker mo orchestration, ma Terraform mo atina'e e pei o le code. Matou te galulue fa'atasi foi ma Python mo AI / ML workloads, Power BI ma Fabric mo pisinisi atamai, ma PostgreSQL, SQL Server, ma MongoDB mo fa'amatalaga.

enterprise.question: Fa'afefea ona e fa'atautaia galuega faatino?
enterprise.answer: So'o se fa'ata'ita'iga e amata i se vaega o le mauaina e fa'amatala ai le lautele, fausaga, ma mea taua. E te maua se 'au tuuto ma se ta'ita'iga fa'apitoa, iloiloga masani o mea taua, ma avanoa tuusa'o i inisinia o lo'o fausiaina lau polokalama. Matou te mulimuli i agile sprints ma pa'aga demos, tausia manino poloketi laupapa, ma tu'uina atu vaiaso ta'itasi alualu i luma lipoti.

support.question: O le a le foliga o le lagolago pe a mae'a le fa'alauiloaina?
support.answer: Matou te ofoina atu fa'atulagaina lagolago tulaga ma fa'amatalaina SLAs, e aofia ai le 24/7 mata'ituina, tali atu i fa'alavelave, fa'atinoga fa'alelei, ma foliga fa'ata'ita'iga. O a matou maliega lagolago e aofia ai bug fixes, security patches, infrastructure scaling, ma proactive health checks — tailored to your uptime and response-time requirements.

integration.question: E mafai ona e tu'ufa'atasia ma la matou atina'e o lo'o i ai nei?
integration.answer: Ioe. Matou te fa'apitoa i le fa'aonaponei o measina, API-muamua tu'ufa'atasia, ma hybrid cloud migrations. Pe e te mana'omia le fa'afeso'ota'i i luga o le fale ERP system, femalagaa'i mai monoliths i microservices, po'o le fa'afeso'ota'i o fa'amaumauga fa'amaumauga ma fa'aonapo nei frontends, o lo'o ia i matou le femalagaa'iga ta'aloga ma le tu'ufa'atasia o le poto masani e fa'afaigofie ai.

industries.question: O a pisinisi na e galue ai?
industries.answer: O la matou 'au na tu'uina atu poloketi i fintech, soifua maloloina, logistics, e-commerce, malosiaga, ma vaega a le malo. Matou te malamalama i mana'oga fa'apitoa e pei o le PCI-DSS mo totogiina, HIPAA iloiloga mo fa'amaumauga o le soifua maloloina, tausisia o le GDPR mo maketi a le EU, ma le telemetry taimi moni mo alamanuia IoT.

engagement.question: O le a le foliga o le faagasologa o le faagasologa?
engagement.answer: E amata i se vala'au su'esu'e e malamalama ai i au sini ma laufanua fa'apitoa. Mai iina, matou te tu'uina atu se pepa fa'amaumauga ma fautuaga fausaga, taimi fa'atulagaina, ma tupe teu fa'afaigaluega. A mae'a ona fa'amaonia, matou te amataina ma se 'au tuuto, fa'apipi'i i totonu o au mea faigaluega ma workflows, ma amata le muamua sprint i totonu o aso.

faq.stillHaveQuestions: E i ai pea ni fesili?
faq.ctaDescription: E i ai sau poloketi i lou mafaufau? Se'i o tatou talanoa e uiga i le lautele, taimi, ma le paketi.
